No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty or implementing social protection.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus relates to ending hunger, improving nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus relates to health outcomes, disease prevention, or well-being initiatives.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), provides language skills for employment (4.4), and fosters global mobility, contributing to global citizenship and cultural diversity (4.7). Model B's reasoning is more comprehensive.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.
